## Validation

- [ ] Build succeeds
- [ ] Tests pass
- [ ] Relevant manual UI checks completed

## Memory Impact

- [ ] This change does not affect memory-sensitive paths
- [ ] This change affects memory-sensitive paths and I ran the memory smoke checklist
- [ ] Profiler bundle / snapshot attached or referenced when memory-sensitive behavior changed

Memory-sensitive paths include:

- playlist loading / switching
- waveform rendering / fullscreen waveform
- search / sorting
- album art / metadata lifecycle
- hidden dialogs / sidebars / lazy-loaded UI
